steps.title: Identify the key constraint for emphasis
steps.content: The audience already knows Jane Luu, so emphasizing her discovery of TO66 requires isolating that discovery, not rehashing her general reputation or comparing it to other finds.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
D focuses entirely on (19308) 1996 TO66 with specific details—date, collaborators, and the word “exciting”—treating it as a distinct discovery worthy of attention.

A, B, and C split the focus across multiple discoveries or subordinate TO66 to her broader legacy instead of isolating it.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
